rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields only stylistic variants (simpa vs. direct Subtype.ext; rw vs. simp on the 4-step chain; @[simp] mul vs. pow form forcing one rw[pow_two]) that preserve identical proof correctness, structure, and robustness against the shown diff; a maintainer would not insist on any as material proof-quality gains, making the merged PRs equivalent to Review 2's approve.
